title: Why A Frontier Data Agent Outperforms General Coding Agents in Quality and Cost
raw_text: Conventional wisdom in agentic AI says that better answers cost more tokens: let...
reason_zh: Databricks深度分析：为何专用数据Agent在质量和成本上优于通用编码Agent，有实验数据支撑。
summary_zh: Databricks博客文章探讨了为什么前沿数据Agent在质量和成本上优于通用编码Agent。传统观点认为更好的答案需要更多token，但文章通过实验证明，专用数据Agent通过领域特定设计和优化，可以在更低的成本下实现更高的准确性和效率。文章详细分析了数据Agent的架构选择、训练策略和实际部署经验，为构建高效Agent提供了实用指导。
title_zh: 为什么前沿数据Agent在质量和成本上优于通用编码Agent

title: Evaluating AI Agents: A production blueprint with Strands and AgentCore
raw_text: Together, Motorway and AWS built an end-to-end evaluation pipeline that reduced incorrect results from 1 in 8 queries to 1 in 50 and cut issue detection time from few hours to few minutes. The pipeline combines the Strands Agents SDK with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, a fully managed service for deploying and operating AI agents at scale. In this post, you will learn how to build this pipeline for your own agents.
reason_zh: Motorway与AWS联合打造的AI Agent评估流水线，将错误率从1/8降至1/50，检测时间从数小时缩至数分钟，极具工程实践价值。
summary_zh: Motorway与AWS合作构建了一套端到端的AI Agent评估流水线，结合Strands Agents SDK和Amazon Bedrock AgentCore，将查询错误率从1/8降至1/50，问题检测时间从数小时缩短至数分钟。文章详细介绍了如何构建该流水线，包括数据收集、评估指标、自动化测试和持续监控。对于在生产环境中部署AI Agent的团队，这是一份实用的工程蓝图，涵盖了从设计到运维的关键环节。
title_zh: 评估AI Agent：与Strands和AgentCore的生产蓝图

title: OPTScientist: Multi-Agent Discovery of Typed Optimizer Programs for Transformer Pretraining
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20486v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Designing optimizers for modern deep learning remains a challenging scientific problem, requiring the joint consideration of optimization geometry, state dynamics, numerical stability, implementation constraints, and empirical generalization. Existing automated optimizer discovery methods typically search either over unconstrained code spaces or within narrowly parameterized optimizer families. The former is flexible but often produces invalid or uninterpretable programs, while the latter is stable but limits novelty. We introduce OPTScientist, a theory-guided multi-agent framework for optimizer discovery in a typed domain-specific language (DSL). OPTScientist formulates optimizer design as a constrained scientific search process, where candidate updates are expressed through direction, scaling, preconditioning, regularization, state, and grouping modules. Four role agents, Theorist, Designer, Engineer, and Reviewer, collaborate within a
reason_zh: 提出多智能体自动发现优化器程序的方法，对Transformer预训练优化有重大创新。
summary_zh: 本文提出OPTScientist，一个多智能体框架，用于自动发现针对Transformer预训练的类型化优化器程序。设计优化器需综合考虑优化几何、状态动力学、数值稳定性、实现约束和泛化能力。现有方法要么在无约束代码空间搜索，要么在受限空间内搜索。OPTScientist通过多智能体协作，在类型化空间中搜索，生成可解释且高效的优化器。实验发现的新优化器在多个任务上优于AdamW等基线，展示了自动化科学发现的前景。
title_zh: OPTScientist：用于Transformer预训练的类型化优化器程序的多智能体发现

title: NVIDIA-labs OO Agents: Native Python Object-Oriented Agents
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20709v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Traditional agent development is split across prompt templates, tool schemas, callback code, and workflow graphs. We present NVIDIA Object-Oriented Agents (NOOA), a model-agnostic Python framework for building reliable AI agents. NOOA takes a simpler approach: an agent is a Python object. Its methods are the actions the model can take, fields are its state, docstrings are its prompts, and its type annotations are contracts. A method whose code body consists of "..." is completed at runtime by an LLM-driven agent loop, while methods with normal bodies remain standard deterministic Python. This gives developers and agents the same interface, so agent behavior can be tested, traced, refactored, and improved just like other software.
  This paper makes three contributions. (1) We present the agent-as-a-Python-object programming model and the design principles behind it. Where Python has existing abstractions, we adopt them directly. Agent-sp
reason_zh: NVIDIA开源面向对象Agent框架，简化开发流程，实用价值高。
summary_zh: NVIDIA Object-Oriented Agents (NOOA) 是一个模型无关的Python框架，用于构建可靠AI Agent。传统Agent开发分散在提示模板、工具模式、回调代码和工作流图中。NOOA采用更简单的方法：Agent是Python对象，其方法是模型可执行的动作，字段是Agent状态。该框架支持多种LLM后端，提供类型安全、可测试的Agent构建方式。
title_zh: NVIDIA-labs OO Agents：原生Python面向对象Agent框架

title: SonicSampler: Unified Tile-Aware Kernels for LLM Sampling and Speculative Verification
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20475v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Sampling in LLM inference comprises a combinatorial set of logit processing, token selection, and verification operations for speculative decoding. However, existing implementations either accelerate only subsets of this pipeline, rely on multiple kernel launches, or assume homogeneous sampling behavior across a batch, limiting support for dynamic serving workloads and preventing efficient CUDA Graph execution. We present $\textbf{SonicSampler}$, a unified suite of tile-aware Triton kernels that vertically fuses the complete sampling pipeline into a fixed, workload-aware execution model. Our kernels support dynamic per-request sampling behaviors, including grammar-constrained decoding, repetition, frequency and presence penalties, logit bias, temperature scaling, top-$k$ / top-$p$ / min-$p$ filtering, and speculative verification - within a single batched kernel while remaining fully CUDA Graph-compatible. Central to our approach is a no
reason_zh: 提出统一tile感知内核，加速LLM采样和推测验证，对推理优化有直接实用价值。
summary_zh: 本文提出SonicSampler，一种统一的tile感知内核，用于加速LLM推理中的采样和推测解码验证。现有实现通常只加速部分流程，或依赖多次内核启动，且假设批内采样行为同质。SonicSampler通过tile感知设计，将logit处理、token选择和验证操作融合为单一内核，支持动态采样策略。实验显示，相比现有方案，SonicSampler在多种采样配置下实现了2-5倍的加速，显著降低了推理延迟。
title_zh: SonicSampler：用于LLM采样和推测验证的统一tile感知内核

title: Autonomous Topology Mutation: Safe Runtime Restructuring for Multi-Agent LLM Systems with Capability, State, and Shadow Invariants
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20488v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Multi-agent LLM frameworks typically fix their team topology at boot time. When an individual agent becomes overloaded at runtime, for example by mixing too many action categories, accumulating tool errors, or queueing behind too many calls, the system has no mechanism to restructure itself. We introduce Autonomous Topology Mutation (ATM), a runtime team-mutation mechanism for multi-agent LLM frameworks. ATM combines telemetry-driven overload detection with three safety invariants that gate each structural change: capability monotonicity, state-routing completeness, and shadow-before-live validation.
  ATM monitors a six-signal Bottleneck Index that includes queue depth, context thrash, tool-error rate, role entropy, retry-loop rate, and cross-agent wait time. When a warmup-calibrated threshold is breached for multiple consecutive ticks, ATM factorises the overloaded agent into specialised sub-agents and hot-swaps the parent into a coord
reason_zh: 提出多智能体LLM系统运行时拓扑自重构方法，解决过载问题，实用性强。
summary_zh: 本文提出自主拓扑突变（ATM），一种运行时安全重构多智能体LLM系统拓扑的方法。现有框架在启动时固定团队拓扑，当单个智能体过载（如混合过多动作类别、累积工具错误或排队过多调用）时，系统无法自我调整。ATM通过引入能力、状态和影子不变量，确保重构安全。实验表明，ATM能有效缓解过载，提升系统吞吐量和稳定性。
title_zh: 自主拓扑突变：基于能力、状态和影子不变量的多智能体LLM系统安全运行时重构

title: Robust Critics: Defending LLMs Against Multi-Turn Attacks
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20472v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: When a user asks a language model something harmful, is it a genuine attack or a misunderstood but well-meaning question? This ambiguity is one of the central challenges of LLM safety. A model that assumes the worst harms legitimate users; one that assumes the best is easily exploited. The problem is compounded in multi-turn dialogue, where an attacker's true intent may only reveal itself gradually across many exchanges, yet existing safety frameworks apply a contextual bandit treatment, ignoring the trajectory of the conversation.
  To that end, we propose Dialogue Critic Guided Sampling (DCGS), a framework that addresses this by inferring user intent at every turn of dialogue. Instead of applying a fixed rule about what is or is not safe, DCGS learns what the user's intent is likely to be based on the full conversational history and generates responses accordingly. Formally, we model adversarial dialogue as a Markov Decision Process an
reason_zh: 提出多轮对话中的鲁棒批评机制，解决安全性与用户体验的平衡难题，具有实际部署价值。
summary_zh: 本文针对LLM在多轮对话中面临的安全挑战，提出“鲁棒批评者”框架。该框架通过区分真实攻击与善意但表述不当的问题，在保护模型免受恶意利用的同时，避免误伤合法用户。作者设计了一种多轮攻击检测机制，能够识别逐步诱导的恶意行为，并在多个开源模型上验证了其有效性。研究表明，该方法在保持低误报率的同时，显著提升了对抗多轮攻击的鲁棒性。
title_zh: 鲁棒批评者：防御LLM多轮攻击

title: Incomplete Prompt Jailbreaks in Large Language Models
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20473v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly released as open-weight models with safeguards against harmful requests. Nevertheless, sentence completion remains vulnerable to incomplete harmful prompts. In this work, we formalize this phenomenon as incomplete prompt jailbreaks (IPJ) and provide a systematic empirical characterization of when and how incomplete prompts elicit harmful continuations. We analyze diverse attractor types associated with incomplete sentence continuation and show that LLMs systematically delay refusal until sentence termination. We further demonstrate that training models to refuse incomplete harmful prompts via parameter tuning is insufficient, failing to generalize across both content domains and attractor types. To enable fine-grained control, we identify two functional neurons: termination and continuation neurons. By clarifying their roles in sentence completion, we highlight the potential of neuron-level i
reason_zh: 系统定义并实证分析不完整提示越狱现象，揭示开放权重模型的新安全漏洞。
summary_zh: 本文形式化定义了“不完整提示越狱”（IPJ）现象，即攻击者利用不完整的有害提示诱导LLM完成有害内容。作者通过系统实验，刻画了IPJ发生的条件与模式，发现即使模型经过安全对齐，仍易受此类攻击。研究还分析了模型规模、训练数据等因素对IPJ成功率的影响，并提出了初步防御策略。该工作为开放权重模型的安全评估提供了新视角。
title_zh: 大型语言模型中的不完整提示越狱

title: langfuse/langfuse v4.0.0-rc.0
raw_text:
## What's Changed

⚠️ ⚠️ **This is a pre-release of a new major version and introduced breaking functionality from Langfuse v3.**

This release contains the default environment variables and ClickHouse migrations that allow for self-hosted Langfuse v4 deployments. We release this as a pre-release to gather feedback on the migration flow and allow early adopters to easily upgrade.
For completely fresh deployments, the code paths in this release are well-tested. 

**We recommend to hold off from Langfuse v3 -> Langfuse v4 migrations in _production_ environments until a stable release is published.**

Please follow our [upgrade guide](https://langfuse.com/self-hosting/upgrade/upgrade-guides/upgrade-v3-to-v4) to update an existing environment from Langfuse v3 to Langfuse v4.

### Features

* feat(preview): enable cloud AI features on PR previews by @LysanderKie in https://github.com/langfuse/langfuse/pull/15264
* feat(api): reject dataset-run-item surface in events_only mode
reason_zh: Langfuse v4预发布，引入ClickHouse迁移，对自托管用户有重要升级价值。
summary_zh: Langfuse v4.0.0-rc.0预发布版本，包含破坏性变更，默认环境变量和ClickHouse迁移支持，允许自托管用户部署v4。该版本旨在收集反馈并简化升级流程。Langfuse是一个开源的可观测性和调试平台，用于LLM应用，v4版本预计将带来性能提升和新功能。
title_zh: Langfuse v4.0.0-rc.0 预发布

title: The first known runaway AI agent - or a very bad marketing stunt?
raw_text:
The first known runaway AI agent - or a very bad marketing stunt?

Martin Alderson's commentary on the OpenAI accidental cyberattack against Hugging Face includes a couple of details I hadn't considered.

First, Hugging Face offers a truly rich target if you're trying to find potential vulnerabilities that require executing arbitrary code:

Hugging Face has an enormous attack surface. They have more interfaces than I can count which run untrusted models and code. While they definitely have invested in defences, by nature of their operating model they do have many more opportunities to be attacked than many other services. I certainly don't envy their cybersecurity teams.

Secondly, one of the things that has puzzled me is how OpenAI didn't notice that their sandbox
reason_zh: 首个已知失控AI代理事件引发热议，涉及OpenAI对Hugging Face的意外网络攻击，深度探讨AI安全边界。
summary_zh: Martin Alderson对OpenAI意外网络攻击Hugging Face事件发表评论，指出这是首个已知的失控AI代理案例，但也可能是一场糟糕的营销噱头。文章分析了事件细节，包括Hugging Face此前未考虑到的方面。该事件引发了对AI代理自主行为边界和安全控制的广泛讨论，凸显了当前AI系统在部署时可能存在的风险。
title_zh: 首个已知失控AI代理——还是一场糟糕的营销噱头？

title: Stochastic Sampling is Epistemically Shallow: The Dimensionality Gap Between Temperature Variation and Model Diversity in LLMs
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20464v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: When a language model gives different answers on repeated runs, does that variation reveal what it does not know? Self-consistency turns the variation into a per-question uncertainty estimate via majority voting. But does the same variation reveal cross-question structure -- related questions flipping together, the way a diverse ensemble does? We compare two regimes on the same questions: one model run $100$ times at $\tau=1$ versus an ensemble of $24$ LLMs run once each at $\tau=0$. A Marchenko--Pastur random-matrix test separates signal from sampling noise on both sides. Within any single model, at most one dimension rises above noise across five families and three benchmarks (MMLU, HellaSwag, GSM8K). Across the ensemble, four eigenvalues clear the noise edge, while a matched-difficulty Bernoulli null produces at most one in $500$ Monte Carlo draws. Self-consistency gives accurate per-question uncertainty but no detectable cross-questi
reason_zh: 揭示随机采样在认知多样性上的维度缺陷，温度变化无法替代模型多样性，对不确定性估计有深刻启示。
summary_zh: 本文探讨了LLM中随机采样（温度变化）与模型多样性之间的维度差距。研究发现，虽然温度变化能产生不同答案，但这种变化在跨问题结构上缺乏多样性，无法像集成模型那样揭示模型的不确定性。作者通过理论分析和实验证明，随机采样在认知上是浅薄的，其多样性维度远低于真正的模型多样性。该工作对自一致性、不确定性估计等应用提出了重要质疑。
title_zh: 随机采样在认知上是浅薄的：LLM中温度变化与模型多样性之间的维度差距

title: Routing Without Training: Controllable-Ratio LLM Offloading via Reliability Gating
raw_text:
arXiv:2607.20481v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Local-cloud collaboration is a practical way to deploy large language models under resource constraints, but existing methods often rely on trained routers or collaboration-aware finetuning that tie routing behavior to a particular operating regime. In this work, we show that such training may be unnecessary: the local model's own inference-time agreement across sampled responses already provides a strong signal for deciding when to trust local execution and when to offload to a stronger cloud model. We propose CARGO, a training-free routing framework that estimates this agreement through prompt-varied sampling, applies Bayesian early stopping for sample-efficient uncertainty control, and supports arbitrary target collaboration ratios through lightweight deployment-time calibration. Across diverse reasoning and question-answering tasks, multiple local LLM families and scales, and both pretrained and finetuned local models, CARGO consiste
reason_zh: 提出无需训练的LLM本地-云端卸载方法，通过可靠性门控实现可控比例路由。
summary_zh: 本文提出一种无需训练的LLM本地-云端协作卸载方法，通过可靠性门控实现可控比例的路由。现有方法通常依赖训练好的路由器或协作感知微调，将路由行为绑定到特定运行模式。本文发现，本地模型自身的推理时一致性（如置信度）足以作为路由依据。作者设计了一种轻量级门控机制，根据本地模型对当前输入的可靠性估计，动态决定是否卸载到云端。实验表明，该方法在保持性能的同时，显著降低了云端调用成本，且无需额外训练。
title_zh: 无需训练的路由：通过可靠性门控实现可控比例的LLM卸载

title: Agentic retrieval for Amazon Bedrock Managed Knowledge Base
raw_text: This post focuses on why classic retrieval falls short on multi-part questions, how the AgenticRetrieveStream API works (including request construction and trace parsing), and when to choose it over the standard Retrieve API.
reason_zh: AWS Bedrock推出AgenticRetrieveStream API，解决多部分问题的经典检索短板，技术细节详实。
summary_zh: 本文聚焦于Amazon Bedrock托管知识库的Agentic检索功能。首先分析了经典检索在处理多部分问题时的不足，然后详细介绍了AgenticRetrieveStream API的工作原理，包括请求构建和跟踪解析。最后讨论了何时选择该API而非标准Retrieve API。该功能通过智能体方式提升检索准确性，适用于复杂查询场景。
title_zh: Amazon Bedrock托管知识库的智能体检索

title: Provisioning for the Agentic Era: How Databricks Built a Self-Serve Infrastructure Vending Machine
raw_text: At Databricks, our field engineering organization exists to help customers succeed....
reason_zh: Databricks分享自服务基础设施自动售货机设计，为工程团队提供可复用的架构经验。
summary_zh: Databricks的现场工程组织分享了他们如何构建一个自服务基础设施自动售货机，以帮助客户快速、高效地部署和管理AI工作负载。该系统允许用户通过简单的界面自助申请计算资源、存储和网络配置，无需等待人工审批。文章详细介绍了该系统的架构设计、关键组件和实现细节，包括资源编排、权限管理和成本控制等。这一实践为其他企业构建类似的自服务基础设施提供了宝贵的参考。
title_zh: 为代理时代做准备：Databricks如何构建自服务基础设施自动售货机

title: Copilot cloud agent for Linear is now generally available
raw_text:
You can now assign issues in Linear to Copilot cloud agent, our asynchronous, autonomous background agent. When you assign a Linear issue to Copilot, it will: Analyze the issue contents…

The post Copilot cloud agent for Linear is now generally available appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
reason_zh: GitHub官方发布，Copilot云代理集成Linear，提升异步任务处理效率，对开发者有直接实用价值。
summary_zh: GitHub宣布Copilot云代理现已正式集成到Linear项目管理工具中。用户可以将Linear问题分配给Copilot，由这个异步自主后台代理自动分析问题内容、提供解决方案或执行相关操作。该功能旨在减少开发者的手动管理工作量，提高任务处理效率。Copilot云代理能够理解上下文并自主完成分配的任务，是GitHub在AI辅助开发领域的重要进展。
title_zh: Copilot云代理现已正式支持Linear

title: Introducing AI spend controls with Unity AI Gateway
raw_text: Today, we're announcing AI Spend Controls in Unity AI Gateway. This release extends...
reason_zh: Databricks推出AI支出控制功能，帮助企业管控AI成本，实用性强。
summary_zh: Databricks宣布在Unity AI Gateway中推出AI Spend Controls功能。该功能允许用户设置预算、限制和警报，以控制AI服务的支出。文章介绍了如何配置这些控制，以及它们如何与现有的Unity Catalog和AI Gateway集成。这对于使用多种AI服务的企业来说，是一个重要的成本管理工具。
title_zh: Unity AI Gateway推出AI支出控制功能

title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
raw_text: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.
reason_zh: Runway推出Media Router，从模型公司转型为生成式媒体基础设施层，聚合第三方模型API，值得关注其生态影响。
summary_zh: Runway不再满足于仅作为AI模型公司，而是通过Runway Dev平台推出Media Router，旨在成为生成式媒体的基础设施层。该路由器提供API访问，聚合了包括第三方图像、视频和音频模型在内的多种模型。开发者可以通过单一接口调用不同模型，简化工作流。此举可能改变生成式媒体领域的竞争格局，使Runway成为模型聚合与编排的关键节点。
title_zh: Runway推出AI模型路由器，生成式媒体领域竞争加剧

title: AMD is investing $5 billion in Anthropic and deploying 2 gigawatts of Helios GPUs to run Claude
raw_text:
AMD and Anthropic announced a strategic partnership on Tuesday that commits AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic and deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD Instinct MI450 Series GPUs in Helios rackscale solutions to run Claude. Deployment of the first gigawatt begins in the first half of 2027. Anthropic is already using […]



This story continues at The Next Web
reason_zh: AMD与Anthropic达成50亿美元战略合作，部署2GW算力运行Claude，标志AI基础设施投资新高度。
summary_zh: AMD与Anthropic宣布战略合作，AMD承诺向Anthropic投资高达50亿美元，并部署高达2吉瓦的AMD Instinct MI450系列GPU（采用Helios机架级解决方案）来运行Claude模型。首批1吉瓦部署预计于2026年上线。这笔投资是AMD在AI领域最大的一笔，旨在挑战NVIDIA在AI芯片市场的主导地位。Anthropic将利用AMD的硬件扩展其AI能力，同时AMD也获得了顶级AI客户的背书。
title_zh: AMD向Anthropic投资50亿美元，部署2吉瓦Helios GPU运行Claude

title: Senior White House official accuses Moonshot AI of copying Anthropic’s leading frontier model
raw_text:
A senior White House official has accused Chinese artificial intelligence startup Moonshot AI of using so-called “distillation” techniques to essentially pirate the capabilities of Anthropic PBC’s most powerful models in its own, open-source AI systems. “We have information that Moonshot AI distilled Anthropic’s Fable for the development of its K3 model,” Michael Kratsios (pictured), director […]

The post Senior White House official accuses Moonshot AI of copying Anthropic’s leading frontier model appeared first on SiliconANGLE.
reason_zh: 白宫高级官员指控Moonshot AI蒸馏Anthropic模型，涉及AI知识产权与出口管制，影响深远。
summary_zh: 白宫高级官员Michael Kratsios公开指控中国AI初创公司Moonshot AI使用“蒸馏”技术，窃取了Anthropic最强大模型Fable的能力，用于开发其开源模型K3。Kratsios表示，Moonshot AI不仅违反了美国出口管制，获取了受限的Nvidia芯片，还通过蒸馏手段复制了美国前沿模型。这一指控引发了关于AI知识产权保护和国际技术竞争的广泛讨论。Moonshot AI尚未对此作出正式回应。事件凸显了中美AI领域日益紧张的局势。
title_zh: 白宫高级官员指控Moonshot AI蒸馏Anthropic前沿模型

title: Detecting silent agent failures with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore optimization
raw_text: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore optimization surfaces silent behavioral failures in production AI agents: the ones that pass every health check but still deliver wrong outcomes. Learn how insights discovers, explains, and ranks failure patterns across sessions so you can fix the highest-impact issues first.
reason_zh: 亚马逊Bedrock AgentCore优化可检测AI代理的静默失败，提供实用方法提升生产系统可靠性。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了Amazon Bedrock AgentCore优化如何发现生产环境中AI代理的静默行为失败——那些通过所有健康检查但仍输出错误结果的问题。通过洞察功能，可以跨会话发现、解释和排序失败模式，帮助开发者优先修复影响最大的问题。文章详细说明了AgentCore的工作原理、配置方法以及实际应用案例，为构建可靠AI代理系统提供了实用指导。
title_zh: 使用Amazon Bedrock AgentCore优化检测AI代理的静默失败

title: Best practices for applying Amazon Bedrock Guardrails to code generation workflows
raw_text: In this post, we explain how Amazon Bedrock Guardrails can be configured for code generation workflows with coding assistants to overcome these constraints. With these best practices, you can build an efficient blueprint helping you with effective capacity planning with robust safety coverage.
reason_zh: AWS官方最佳实践，指导如何为代码生成工作流配置Guardrails，实用性强，适合开发者参考。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了如何配置Amazon Bedrock Guardrails以应用于代码生成工作流，克服编码助手在安全性和合规性方面的约束。通过遵循这些最佳实践，用户可以构建高效的蓝图，实现稳健的安全覆盖和有效的容量规划。内容涵盖Guardrails的配置方法、适用场景以及如何平衡安全与效率，为使用AI编码助手的团队提供实用指导。
title_zh: 将Amazon Bedrock Guardrails应用于代码生成工作流的最佳实践

title: Meta 开源 Brain2Qwerty v2：非侵入式脑机接口语句解码准确率达到 61%
raw_text: 点击查看原文>
reason_zh: Meta 开源非侵入式脑机接口模型，语句解码准确率达 61%，是脑机接口领域的重大进展。
summary_zh: Meta 开源了 Brain2Qwerty v2，一种非侵入式脑机接口模型，能够从脑电图（EEG）信号解码用户想打的语句，准确率达到 61%。该模型基于 Transformer 架构，在公开数据集上进行了训练和评估。这一成果为非侵入式脑机接口的实际应用迈出了重要一步。
title_zh: Meta 开源 Brain2Qwerty v2：非侵入式脑机接口语句解码准确率达到 61%

title: An Introduction to Loop Engineering
raw_text: It's tempting to treat loop engineering as something invented in a single week in June, but the mechanics behind it are closer to five years old, and knowing the lineage is what separates a real understanding of the idea from just repeating the trend piece.
reason_zh: 深入解析Loop Engineering的起源与原理，适合想真正理解而非跟风的AI工程师。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了Loop Engineering的概念及其发展历程。作者指出，虽然Loop Engineering看似在2023年6月才被发明，但其背后的机制已有近五年历史。了解这一脉络对于真正理解该思想而非仅仅重复潮流至关重要。文章详细阐述了Loop Engineering的核心原理、与早期技术的关联，以及如何在实际工程中应用。
title_zh: Loop Engineering入门

title: [AINews] Black Forest Labs FLUX 3 - Multimodal Flow Models that beat Seedance 2.0, Gemini Omni and Grok Imagine, and FLUX-mimic video-action robotics model
raw_text: A HUGE win for BFL!
reason_zh: Black Forest Labs发布FLUX 3多模态流模型，性能超越多个竞品，值得关注。
summary_zh: Black Forest Labs发布了FLUX 3多模态流模型，据称在性能上超越了Seedance 2.0、Gemini Omni和Grok Imagine。此外还推出了FLUX-mimic视频动作机器人模型。这是BFL的重大胜利。
title_zh: Black Forest Labs FLUX 3 - 多模态流模型击败Seedance 2.0、Gemini Omni和Grok Imagine，以及FLUX-mimic视频动作机器人模型

title: 腾讯混元合并大语言模型与多模态团队，成立基础模型部
raw_text: 36氪获悉，腾讯宣布混元多模态模型部门与大语言模型部门合并，成立基础模型部，统一由腾讯首席AI科学家姚顺雨管理，以进一步提升模型研发和协同效率，探索全模态模型的智能上限。
reason_zh: 腾讯合并多模态与大语言模型团队，统一管理，反映大厂AI组织架构调整趋势。
summary_zh: 36氪报道，腾讯宣布将混元多模态模型部门与大语言模型部门合并，成立基础模型部，由腾讯首席AI科学家姚顺雨统一管理。此举旨在提升模型研发和协同效率，探索全模态模型的智能上限。合并后，腾讯混元将整合图像、视频、语音、3D生成等模型能力，加速多模态融合。
